# BP-122 positive variant: Chi middleware only records the request.
lang: go
file: BP-122-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: chi
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
)

func record(handler http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = handler
		_ = r.URL.Path
	})
}

func router() chi.Router { return chi.NewRouter() }
